methods.name: get_placement_start_from_bending_roller
methods.signature: get_placement_start_from_bending_roller( shape: BendingShape, side_number: int, bending_roller: float, base_line: Line2D | Line3D, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, ) -> float
methods.summary: For the placement of longitudinal bars, located on one of the legs of a transverse bar (e.g. a stirrup), this function calculates the X-component between the edge of the concrete cross-section and the start point of the placement of the longitudinal bars
methods.remarks: For the placement of longitudinal bars, located on one of the legs of a transverse bar (e.g. a stirrup), this function calculates the X-component between the edge of the concrete cross-section and the start point of the placement of the longitudinal bars

params.name: shape
params.doc: Bending shape of the transverse bar

params.name: side_number
params.doc: Number of the leg, on which the longitudinal bars are located (starting from 1)

params.name: bending_roller
params.doc: Bending roller if the transverse bar

params.name: base_line
params.doc: The outline of the concrete cross section

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Bar diameter of the longitudinal bars

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Model angles to get the local x/y coordinate system for the calculation

returns.doc: Calculated distance to the placement start

methods.name: get_placement_end_from_bending_roller
methods.signature: get_placement_end_from_bending_roller( shape: BendingShape, side_number: int, bending_roller: float, base_line: Line2D | Line3D, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, ) -> float
methods.summary: For the placement of longitudinal bars, located on one of the legs of a transverse bar (e.g. a stirrup), this function calculates the X-component between the edge of the concrete cross-section and the end point of the placement of the longitudinal bars
methods.remarks: For the placement of longitudinal bars, located on one of the legs of a transverse bar (e.g. a stirrup), this function calculates the X-component between the edge of the concrete cross-section and the end point of the placement of the longitudinal bars

params.name: shape
params.doc: Bending shape of the transverse bar

params.name: side_number
params.doc: Number of the leg, on which the longitudinal bars are located (starting from 1)

params.name: bending_roller
params.doc: Bending roller if the transverse bar

params.name: base_line
params.doc: The outline of the concrete cross section

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Bar diameter of the longitudinal bars

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Model angles to get the local x/y coordinate system for the calculation

returns.doc: Calculated distance to the placement end

methods.name: get_placement_inside_bending_roller
methods.signature: get_placement_inside_bending_roller( shape: BendingShape, corner_number: int, bending_roller: float, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, global_point: bool = False, ) -> Point3D
methods.summary: Calculate the position of a placement inside the bending roller
methods.remarks: Calculate the position of a placement inside the bending roller

params.name: shape
params.doc: Bending shape of the transverse bar

params.name: corner_number
params.doc: Number of the transverse bar's corner, in which the placement point should be calculated (starting from 1)

params.name: bending_roller
params.doc: Bending roller of the transverse bar

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Bar diameter of the longitudinal bar

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Model angles to get the local x/y coordinate system for the calculation

params.name: global_point
params.doc: If set to True, the result will be a point in global coordinates. Otherwise, the point in local coordinate system will be returned.

returns.doc: Local point of the longitudinal bar placement

methods.name: get_placement_inside_side_intersection
methods.signature: get_placement_inside_side_intersection( shape1: BendingShape, side_number1: int, above_side1: bool, shape2: BendingShape, side_number2: int, above_side2: bool, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, global_point: bool = False, ) -> Point2D | Point3D
methods.summary: Calculate the position of a longitudinal bar placed at an intersection of two legs of transverse bars (e.g. two stirrups)
methods.remarks: Calculate the position of a longitudinal bar placed at an intersection of two legs of transverse bars (e.g. two stirrups)

params.name: shape1
params.doc: Shape of the first transverse rebar

params.name: side_number1
params.doc: Number of the leg in the first shape to consider in the calculation (starting from 1)

params.name: above_side1
params.doc: When set to True, the point will be calculated above the leg of the first shape. Otherwise below.

params.name: shape2
params.doc: Shape of the second transverse rebar

params.name: side_number2
params.doc: Number of the leg in the second shape to consider in the calculation (starting from 1)

params.name: above_side2
params.doc: When set to True, the point will be calculated above the leg of the second shape. Otherwise below.

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Bar diameter of the longitudinal bar

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Model angles to get the local x/y coordinate system for the calculation

params.name: global_point
params.doc: If set to True, the result will be a 3D point in global coordinates. Otherwise, a 2D point in local coordinate system will be returned.
